goal: autopilot 오케스트레이션 청사진 완성: driver가 variant_candidates를 description으로 최종 선택하는 절차 명문화(②), planner generated_nodes의 optional agent_hint override(③), fileOverlapGate를 통과한 독립 ready 노드의 wave 병렬 spawn(①)
in_scope: autopilot SKILL.md step 2에 variant_candidates 기반 driver 최종선택 절차 명문화 (②)
nodeProposal optional agent_hint + dispatch가 hint를 variant 후보로 노출 + planner.md 지침 (③)
next-node가 fileOverlapGate wave 전체를 반환 + driver 병렬 spawn + record-result 노드별 독립 (①)
autopilot-contract.md §3.1 단일→다중 owner 동시 dispatch 개정 (①에 수반)
out_of_scope: description 기반 최종 선택 로직을 코드에 구현(여전히 driver/main agent 책임)
OBSERVABLE 한국어 게이트 / bootstrap seed-planner 중복 finding (별개 버그)

acceptance_criteria.statement: autopilot SKILL.md step 2 contains a documented procedure: when packet.variant_candidates has 2 or more entries the driver selects subagent_type by description, with exactly 1 entry it uses that entry, with 0 it falls back to the node owner

nodeProposal schema accepts an optional agent_hint field; when a promoted planner proposal carries agent_hint, dispatch surfaces that hinted variant within variant_candidates, and planner.md documents the optional hint

next-node returns every fileOverlapGate-admitted ready node as a wave rather than only the first; a disjoint 2-node wave yields 2 dispatched spawn entries, and the existing single-ready-node path returns 1 entry unchanged
bun test exits 0 with the full suite green and the existing single-owner autopilot behavior unchanged (backward compatible)

follow_up_candidates: 병렬 spawn 시 record-result 동시성/충돌 정책 강화
bootstrap seed를 design-only로 축소(planner 확장과 중복 제거)
